entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the target crop for improving oleic acid content and pod yield

entities.name: OLEIC ACID CONTENT
entities.description: A fatty acid trait associated with extended shelf life and health benefits, regulated by ahFAD2 alleles

entities.name: SHELF LIFE
entities.description: A trait of peanuts that is extended by high oleic acid content

entities.name: HEALTH BENEFITS
entities.description: Positive health outcomes associated with high oleic acid content in peanuts

entities.name: LINOLEIC ACID CONTENT
entities.description: A fatty acid trait in peanuts regulated by ahFAD2A and ahFAD2B mutant alleles

entities.name: PALMITIC ACID CONTENT
entities.description: A fatty acid trait in peanuts regulated by ahFAD2A and ahFAD2B mutant alleles

entities.name: AHFAD2A
entities.description: A mutant allele that regulates oleic, linoleic, and palmitic acid contents in peanuts

entities.name: AHFAD2B
entities.description: A mutant allele that regulates oleic, linoleic, and palmitic acid contents in peanuts

entities.name: SUNOLEIC 95R
entities.description: A peanut source containing ahFAD2A and ahFAD2B mutant alleles

entities.name: GG-7
entities.description: A popular peanut cultivar used as a target for introgression of mutant alleles

entities.name: TKG19A
entities.description: A popular peanut cultivar used as a target for introgression of mutant alleles

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A method used to develop lines with increased oleic acid content

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A method used to develop lines with increased oleic acid content and recover recurrent parent genome

entities.name: MINERAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: The overall mineral content of peanut kernels, which remained unchanged in high oleic lines

entities.name: VITAMIN COMPOSITION
entities.description: The overall vitamin content of peanut kernels, which remained unchanged in high oleic lines

entities.name: POTASSIUM CONTENT
entities.description: A specific mineral trait that was altered in high oleic introgression lines

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: A productivity trait that was increased in certain introgression lines

entities.name: RECOMBINATION BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method used to achieve recurrent parent genome recovery

entities.name: GENOME RECOVERY
entities.description: The process of recovering the genetic background of the recurrent parent in introgression lines
